heading: Producer agreement required as condition of provision of direct payments and counter-cyclical payments
label: 7915 Producer agreement required as condition of provision of direct payments and counter-cyclical payments

children.label: A
children.text: to comply with applicable conservation requirements under subtitle B of title XII of the Food Security Act of 1985 ( et seq.);16 U.S.C. 3811

children.label: B
children.text: to comply with applicable wetland protection requirements under subtitle C of title XII of the Act ( et seq.);16 U.S.C. 3821

children.label: C
children.text: to comply with the planting flexibility requirements of ;section 7916 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: to use the land on the farm, in a quantity equal to the attributable base acres for the farm and any base acres for peanuts for the farm under subchapter III for an agricultural or conserving use, and not for a nonagricultural commercial or industrial use, as determined by the Secretary; and

children.label: E
children.text: to effectively control noxious weeds and otherwise maintain the land in accordance with sound agricultural practices, as determined by the Secretary, if the agricultural or conserving use involves the noncultivation of any portion of the land referred to in subparagraph (D).

children.heading: Compliance
children.label: 2 Compliance
children.text: The Secretary may issue such rules as the Secretary considers necessary to ensure producer compliance with the requirements of paragraph (1).

children.heading: Modification
children.label: 3 Modification
children.text: At the request of the transferee or owner, the Secretary may modify the requirements of this subsection if the modifications are consistent with the objectives of this subsection, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Transfer or change of interest in farm
children.label: b Transfer or change of interest in farm

children.heading: Termination
children.label: 1 Termination
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), a transfer of (or change in) the interest of the producers on a farm in base acres for which direct payments or counter-cyclical payments are made shall result in the termination of the payments with respect to the base acres, unless the transferee or owner of the acreage agrees to assume all obligations under subsection (a). The termination shall take effect on the date determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: If a producer entitled to a direct payment or counter-cyclical payment dies, becomes incompetent, or is otherwise unable to receive the payment, the Secretary shall make the payment, in accordance with rules issued by the Secretary.

children.heading: Acreage reports
children.label: c Acreage reports
children.text: As a condition on the receipt of any benefits under this subchapter or subchapter II, the Secretary shall require producers on a farm to submit to the Secretary annual acreage reports with respect to all cropland on the farm.

children.heading: Tenants and sharecroppers
children.label: d Tenants and sharecroppers
children.text: In carrying out this subchapter, the Secretary shall provide adequate safeguards to protect the interests of tenants and sharecroppers.

children.heading: Sharing of payments
children.label: e Sharing of payments
children.text: The Secretary shall provide for the sharing of direct payments and counter-cyclical payments among the producers on a farm on a fair and equitable basis.
